name: argus
description: Monitor what AI agents access on your machine — files, credentials, network connections, and browser data. Argus sees everything your AI apps do.

tools.name: get_active_ai_processes
tools.description: List AI agents and LLM apps detected on this machine

tools.name: get_file_accesses
tools.description: Show sensitive file accesses by AI agents (credentials, browser data, documents)

tools.name: get_network_activity
tools.description: Show network connections made by AI agents

tools.name: get_sessions
tools.description: Show AI agent session history (start, stop, duration)

tools.name: get_daily_summary
tools.description: Get daily stats — process count, alerts, network events, AI services

tools.name: get_injection_alerts
tools.description: Show prompt injection attempts detected in files

tools.name: get_ai_usage
tools.description: Show AI tool token usage and estimated costs

tools.name: get_monitoring_status
tools.description: Check monitoring status and overall stats
